'''Talbrek''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Kubaz/Legends|Kubaz]] informer who worked on the [[Kwilaan Starport/Legends|Kwilaan Spaceport]], in [[Naboo/Legends|Naboo]] during the last decades of the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]].

In [[31 BBY/Legends|31 BBY]], Talbrek met with [[Army of Life]] agent [[Del Binjitt]], who wanted to hire some pilots to transport illegal cargo to another [[Planet/Legends|planet]]. Talbrek staged a meeting between Binjitt and some candidates at a local [[Restaurant/Legends|dining]] [[Cantina/Legends|establishment]], [[Frundle's Cantina]].

==Appearances==
*{{Wizards|url=default.asp?x=starwars/article/sw20010222part1|text=Operation: Clodhopper Part I: Rendezvous at Frundle's|int=Operation: Clodhopper}}
